name: EdwLoadMbrCardRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MBR CARD' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE c SET c.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC c JOIN cte ON c.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND c.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND c.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND c.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE c.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
Â© Copyright 2011 Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas City

Called by:
                    IdsClsPlnCustSvcIdCardPhnCntl

Processing:
                    Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW

Control Job Rerun Information: 
                    Previous Run Successful:    Restart, no other steps necessary
                    Previous Run Aborted:         Restart, no other steps necessary

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS 
Class Plan Customer Service ID Card Phone with a value "N" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
Job name:
EdwLoadMbrCardRunCycUpd
